name: Zed
skills: native Zed agent skills when supported
mcp: Use Zed MCP settings for native agents and the external agent's own MCP configuration for ACP agents.
permissions: Distinguish native Zed tool permissions from ACP or terminal-thread tool permissions.
autonomy: Use Zed Agent Panel, ACP external agents, or terminal threads deliberately; do not mix their guarantees.
evidence_capture: Use Zed review surfaces, terminal logs, screenshots, and KBD artifacts.
handoff: Move between native, ACP, and terminal paths through repository artifacts, not UI memory.
recovery: If a capability exists only in one Zed path, switch paths explicitly and record the reason.
public_boundary_verification: Use the running app, rendered route, command, or package output as completion evidence.
